overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character exploring a foggy rural farm at dawn. The character walks through a dense cornfield, approaches a wooden farmhouse with a hay wagon, circles around the property past a lean-to shed, and heads back into the open foggy field.

events.description: character transitions from standing still to walking forward through the cornfield

agents.ego_description: standing still in the foggy cornfield looking toward the horizon, then begins walking forward

entered.detail: tall tree with spreading branches silhouetted against the fog
dense field of tall dry corn stalks surrounding the character
rolling hills barely visible through the thick fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a stationary view of a foggy cornfield at dawn. A large oak tree stands to the left while foggy hills fade into the distance. The character stands still for several seconds before beginning to walk forward through the tall corn.

events.description: white wooden farmhouse emerges from the fog on the right side
wooden wagon loaded with hay bales becomes visible beside the farmhouse

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the tall corn toward the farmhouse emerging from the fog

entered.detail: two-story wooden farmhouse with dark roof emerging from the fog
wooden wagon with hay bales parked near the house

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the dense cornfield as a white wooden farmhouse gradually emerges from the fog on the right. A hay wagon becomes visible beside the house as the character approaches. The large oak tree from the opening recedes behind.

events.description: character exits the cornfield and steps onto the dirt yard surrounding the farmhouse
character rounds the corner of the house revealing a lean-to shed and outhouse in the back yard

agents.ego_description: circling around the farmhouse, passing the hay wagon and approaching the outbuildings in the back yard

entered.detail: open wooden shelter structure behind the main house
small wooden shed or outhouse in the back yard
cleared dirt area surrounding the farmhouse buildings

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the cornfield and enters the dirt yard around the farmhouse. The camera passes the hay wagon and circles around the house, revealing a lean-to shed and wooden outhouse in the back yard. The farmhouse transitions from the right side to the left as the character rounds the corner.

events.description: character leaves the farmhouse complex behind and enters the open field beyond

agents.ego_description: walking away from the farmhouse into the open foggy field, leaving the buildings behind

entered.detail: grassy open area beyond the farm buildings with sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the farmhouse complex into an open grassy field. The farm buildings recede into the fog behind as the character continues forward through the sparse vegetation toward the distant foggy hills.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a foggy cornfield toward a rural farmhouse before receding back into the open wilderness. It begins with a stationary view of a large oak tree and distant hills shrouded in dawn mist, before the character starts walking forward through the tall corn. As the character advances, a white wooden farmhouse and a hay wagon gradually emerge from the fog on the right while the oak tree recedes into the background. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the cornfield to enter the dirt yard, circling the house to reveal a lean-to shed and a wooden outhouse in the back. Finally, the camera moves away from the farm complex and into an open grassy field, leaving the buildings to fade back into the fog toward the distant hills.
